description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular, dark wood structure with a flat top surface suitable for placing small items. The front side displays two drawers, each equipped with a small, round knob handle, providing storage space for personal belongings. The sides and back are solid panels, with the back and one side finished in a matching dark wood grain, while the other side appears to have a lighter, plain panel. The legs are straight and extend directly downward from the corners, giving the piece a sturdy and stable appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. Its compact form makes it ideal for placement in tight spaces, such as beside a bed or against a wall.
description: A compact, dark wood nightstand with two drawers and round knob handles, featuring a minimalist design and straight legs. One side panel is lighter, contrasting with the otherwise dark finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing a light-colored panel framed by dark wood, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid dark wood panel and the flat top surface, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing two drawers with round knob handles, both set in a dark wood panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid dark wood panel, similar to view 1, and no visible drawers or handles.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
